Anti-MÃ¼llerian Hormone Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/anti-mullerian-hormone-test/ 
Anti-MÃ¼llerian Hormone Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an anti-mÃ¼llerian hormone (AMH) test? 
An anti-mÃ¼llerian hormone (AMH) test measures the amount of AMH in a blood sample. In males, AMH is made by the testicles (or testes), which are glands that make sperm and male hormones. In females, the ovaries make AMH. The ovaries are glands where eggs form and female hormones are made.
